Innovation

From research
to real-world.

TRI AI Innovation supports the development of tools, datasets, and systems that translate research into deployable AI applications across the continent.

Status

Launching with our first initiative.

The Innovation division is a structural placeholder while we ready our first launch. Until then, we're focused on the work happening in Teaching and Research. Subscribe to TRI AI Dispatch to be the first to hear when Innovation goes live.

Subscribe Explore research

Monthly updates on programmes, research, and opportunities — delivered straight to your inbox.
